scripts.dev:api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd apps/api; if (!(Test-Path .venv)) { python -m venv .venv }; .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; pip install -r requirements.txt; uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.install:api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd apps/api; if (!(Test-Path .venv)) { python -m venv .venv }; .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; pip install -r requirements.txt"
